narrative:
Ashland County has 33,436 registered voters, with 50.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.5 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.8% of registrants.
